refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets derived from mission inputs, traceability matrices, and history logs of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance targets
Traceable data storage schema for requirements and history
Update management workflow with version control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance targets; Traceable data storage schema for requirements and history; Update management workflow with version control

potential_sources: Data dependencies between derivation engine and storage schema
Update workflow coupling with storage schema
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically coupled but can be modularized with clear interfaces; no circular dependencies detected.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions between derivation, storage, and update management to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports update synchronization and history management across distributed components

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core logic and data reside here; low diffusion as interfaces are well defined.
Vehicle module is primarily execution hardware; minimal containment of performance derivation logic.
Teleoperation focuses on control; not suitable for performance requirement management.
Safety Services may consume performance data but does not contain derivation or management logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the performance requirement derivation and management in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and history management effectively.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Risk of single point of failure impacting performance requirement availability
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate modularization within NGHE Solution to separate derivation, recording, and management submodules if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional decomposition is clear and maps logically to selected DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralization in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity and diffusion internally.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as ownership candidate; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data validation, traceability audits, and update history reviews within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR subfunctions to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit internal submodule boundaries within NGHE Solution for scalability.
Refine interface specifications for update synchronization over Network Link.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, refinement of internal modularization and interface definitions is needed to mitigate complexity and diffusion risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To introduce internal submodule boundaries within NGHE Solution and clarify interface details for update management.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can be extended internally without architectural conflicts
open_risks: Complexity and diffusion within NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Performance of derivation algorithms under real mission data
Traceability and update history audit results
Interface robustness tests over Network Link
